subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-12-02
subcodes.first_line: I have been in your gatherings many times. I have not attended one-tenth
subcodes.first_line_orig: من در نیو یورک خیلی در مجامع شما بودم اقامت من در سایر شهرها عشر این نبود
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a source of light; guidance
